error_signature: HTTP node re-triggers on loop iteration
title: HTTP Request node re-executes in loop
symptom: The HTTP Request node is triggered multiple times during loop iterations, causing slowdowns and increased API costs.
applies_when: Using an HTTP Request node in a loop
not_this_if: HTTP node is not part of a loop
root_cause: In n8n, when looping over nodes, each node is executed for every item passed into it. If the HTTP node is the first in the loop and multiple items are processed, it will be triggered multiple times, which can lead to unexpected behavior and costs.
fix_steps: Pin the execution data of the HTTP node to prevent re-execution
Adjust the workflow to minimize the number of items processed by the HTTP node if possible
agent_instruction: Pin the execution data of the HTTP node to avoid multiple triggers during loop iterations.
